description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on tags matching v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+, as well as on pull requests. Use a single macos-13 job that checks out the repository with submodules, restores and stores file mtimes, installs Qt 6.8.3 and the zstandard pip package, configures and builds a CMake project, runs tests, and packages and uploads the PokeFinder app as a release artifact.
